final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic-style technical diagram of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components with labels.

Style/medium: clean technical illustration, exploded view diagram, infographic aesthetic with clear labeling system
Composition: exploded view showing camera body separated into layers, components arranged radially around central body, clear visual hierarchy
Subject: Sony A7 camera body with all internal and external parts separated and labeled — sensor, shutter mechanism, mirrorless mount, LCD screen, EVF, battery compartment, dials, buttons, ports, processor board
Scene/backdrop: neutral white or light gray gradient background, no distractions, focus entirely on technical diagram
Lighting/mood: even studio lighting, soft shadows to show depth and separation between parts, clinical and educational tone
Color palette: Sony black and silver body tones, subtle blue accents for technical elements, high contrast black text labels
Materials/textures: matte metal finish on body, glass reflections on LCD and EVF, visible circuit board patterns, rubber grip texture
Text (verbatim): "Sony" "A7"
Constraints: all component names must be clearly labeled with leader lines; diagram must be readable at standard print sizes; technical accuracy prioritized over artistic flair
Avoid: photorealistic renderings without labels; cluttered overlapping parts; missing component names; generic camera shapes without Sony A7 specific details
